# C3 Properties — Premium Property Management & Vacation Rentals | Melbourne, FL

> C3 Properties LLC is a boutique short-term rental and vacation rental property management company based in Melbourne, Florida, on the Space Coast. We manage Airbnb, Vrbo, and Booking.com rentals with dynamic pricing, automated 24/7 guest communication, smart home technology, and five-star hospitality. Our flagship listing holds Airbnb Superhost status with a 4.9/5 guest rating at roughly 80% average occupancy. A Stay Starving Holdings company. Phone: (407) 394-5358. Email: info@c3properties.com.

## Services

- **Short-Term & Long-Term Management**: Full-service management for vacation rentals and long-term tenants — Airbnb listing creation through lease management
- **Dynamic Pricing Optimization**: AI-powered nightly rates that adjust to demand, seasonality, rocket launches, and local events
- **Automated Guest Communication**: 24/7 messaging for inquiries, check-in instructions, and review requests
- **Property Setup & Staging**: Professional staging and photography to turn any property into a revenue-generating rental
- **Smart Home Integration**: Keypad entry, smart thermostats, automated lighting, and security for seamless self check-in
- **Market Analysis & Acquisition**: Data-driven analysis to identify high-ROI investment properties
- **Compliance & Taxes**: Florida Statutes Chapter 509 compliance, DBPR licensing, and Florida sales tax + Brevard County tourist development tax collection and remittance

## Featured Property — Relaxing Melbourne Getaway

- 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, sleeps up to 8 guests
- Quiet Melbourne, FL neighborhood, about 10 minutes from the beach
- Full kitchen, washer & dryer, fenced backyard, smart TV, WiFi, self check-in
- Nightly rates typically $215–$375
- 4.9/5 guest rating; Airbnb Superhost-managed; listed on Airbnb, Vrbo, and Booking.com
- Book on Airbnb: https://airbnb.com/h/melbournebeachstay
- Bonus: rocket launches from Cape Canaveral are visible across the Space Coast sky

## Areas Served

Melbourne FL, Melbourne Beach FL, Satellite Beach FL, Palm Bay FL, Viera FL, the Space Coast, and Brevard County, Florida.
